metaDescription: Sentroy's mission and vision — the operational backbone for the software everyone can now build.
mission: To fold the entire operational backbone a product needs — sign-in, payments, email, storage, messaging and more — into one platform, so anyone who can imagine software can run the business behind it.
vision: A world where launching and operating software is as effortless as generating it — where the infrastructure fades into the background, and only the product and the people it serves remain.

principles.title: Own the foundations
principles.body: We build and operate the core infrastructure ourselves instead of reselling someone else's — so we control quality, cost and the roadmap.

principles.title: One platform, one login
principles.body: Every capability lives under a single identity and a single bill. Consolidation isn't a feature — it's the whole point.

principles.title: Built for the builder
principles.body: The faster the world generates software, the more it needs a dependable place to run it. We exist for the people shipping.
